steps.title: Compare burst durations
steps.content: GRB 230307A lasted 200 seconds, while bursts from neutron-star mergers typically last fewer than 2 seconds. The blank must describe that duration as unusually long for this kind of burst.

steps.title: Choose unusual, not unrelated
steps.content: Choice A is a generic event, Choice B means temporary relief, and Choice C means a chance occurrence. The word meaning strange or unusual fits the contrast in burst duration. The answer is D.
